name: Prop Hunt Planet
short_description: Prop Hunt Planet is a fun party game in which certain players have to hide from Hunters by disguising themselves as props all over the earth.
detailed_description:
Prop Hunt Planet is a fun party game in which certain players have to hide from Hunters by disguising themselves as props all over the earth.

Multiplayer and Single Player Modes
Huge Map to explore with lots of Landmarks to visit
Countdown
Spawning
Fun Gameplay
Winner announcement
Repeat
Main menu setup
Multiplayer session setup (Host, find & join games)
Single Player - Race Mode
Well Optimized

and much more…


* Note: If You join a game that has already started, You will be a Spectator until the next round of the game. *
